metadata.name: AI/ML Landing Zone
metadata.description: Deploys a secure AI/ML landing zone (resource groups, networking, AI services, private endpoints, and guardrails) using AVM resource modules via linked templates.
Optional. Admin username for the jumpbox and build VMs.
Admin password for the jumpbox and build VMs.
Optional. VM size for the jumpbox VM.
Optional. Enable platform landing zone integration. When true, private DNS zones and private endpoints are managed by the platform landing zone.
Optional. Base address for the virtual network in CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.0.0).
Optional. Existing subnet names when reusing an existing virtual network.
Optional. Existing virtual network name when reusing an existing virtual network.
Optional. Existing virtual network name when reusing an existing virtual network.
Optional. The private IP address for the Application Gateway.
Optional. Name of the hub virtual network to peer with.
Optional. Resource ID of the hub virtual network to peer with.
Optional. Enable VNet peering with the specified hub virtual network.
Optional. Existing Private DNS Zone IDs when reusing existing zones from a platform landing zone.
Optional. Azure region for AI LZ resources. Defaults to the resource group location.
Optional. Base name to seed resource names; defaults to a 12-char token.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.
Optional. Tags to apply to all resources.

properties.description: Allow Azure Application Gateway management traffic on ports 65200-65535
Allow Internet HTTP traffic from Internet
Azure API Management control plane traffic
Azure Infrastructure Load Balancer health probes
Internal VNet clients to APIM gateway
APIM to Azure SQL for dependencies
APIM to Key Vault for certificates and secrets
APIM to internal backends (OpenAI, AI Services, etc)
APIM to Azure Monitor for telemetry
Allow Azure Bastion control plane traffic
Allow alternate HTTPS traffic from Internet
Allow SSH and RDP to target VMs

value.name: [concat('agw-', parameters('baseName'))]
value.frontendIPConfigurations: [concat( if(variables('deployAppGatewayPip'), createArray(createObject('name', 'publicFrontend', 'properties', createObject('publicIPAddress', createObject('id', if(variables('deployAppGatewayPip'), reference('m-appgw-pip').outputs.resourceId.value, null()))))), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'privateFrontend', 'properties', createObject('privateIPAllocationMethod', 'Static', 'privateIPAddress', parameters('appGwPrivateIp'), 'subnet', createObject('id', if(variables('deployVnet'), concat(reference('m-vnet').outputs.resourceId.value, '/subnets/appgw-subnet'), concat(parameters('existingVnetId'), '/subnets/',  parameters('existingSubnets').appGwSubnet)))))))]
